visual_effects.tracing_beam: Animated gradient border using Framer Motion
visual_effects.glow: Box-shadow with primary color (gold) at 15% opacity

layout_structure.responsive: Mobile-first, stack on mobile, grid on desktop

visuals.badge: Pill shape, glass background, gold border, mono font
visuals.title: Large (text-5xl md:text-7xl), tight tracking, gold gradient on key phrase
visuals.cta_group: Row of buttons: Solid Gold (Primary) + Outline/Glass (Secondary)
visuals.stats: Horizontal flex, minimal separators, mono numbers

interactive_element.style: Floating glass container with 'Tracing Beam' border effect

Channels.style: Tech Grid - 1px dark borders, glowing intersections on hover

Agents_Marketplace.layout: Left: List of Agents (Vertical Tabs) | Right: Agent Preview Card (3D/Tilt effect)
Agents_Marketplace.interaction: Hovering/Clicking a name updates the preview card instantly

Pricing.card_style: Glass panels. Pro plan has a permanent gold glow and a 'Best Value' floating badge.

instructions_to_main_agent: Copy ALL imports and the `LiveChatDemo` component from `Landing.jsx` exactly as is (functionality must be identical).
Implement the new design using the `Dark Luxury Tech` theme.
Use `framer-motion` for entrance animations (fade-in-up) and hover effects (scale, glow).
Use `lucide-react` icons as provided in the original file.
Ensure `useTranslation` hooks are used exactly as in the original file.
Do not use gradients for backgrounds (except subtle glowing orbs). Use solid dark colors with high-contrast borders.
For the 'Tech Grid' background, create a simple SVG pattern component.
Ensure the 'LiveChatDemo' is wrapped in a glass container with a gold border glow.
Replace the standard `img` tags with optimized styling (rounded-xl, border-gold/20).
Make sure the page is fully responsive (stacking order on mobile).
universal_guidelines: Do not make generic centered layouts.
Create depth through layered design elements (z-index).
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
CRITICAL: NO EMOJIS in the UI (use Lucide icons instead).
Follow existing shadcn/ui patterns for components.
